laws.name: Shell Conservation
laws.statement: Sum of weights across all 36 shells is constant

laws.name: Zoom Conservation
laws.statement: Information is preserved across dimensional transitions
laws.invariant: H(project(X, d1)) = H(project(X, d2)) for any d1, d2

laws.name: Phase Conservation
laws.statement: Cardinal + Fixed + Mutable phase balance is maintained

laws.name: Archetype Conservation
laws.statement: Each archetype contributes equally to the whole

laws.name: Mobius Conservation
laws.statement: Mirror pairs sum to unity: w(k) + w(37-k) = 1
